title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding backends in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI wrapper with interactive model picker, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot alternative: VS Code extension that uses Ollama for local code completion.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration: OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template: ingest PDFs, embed with Ollama, and chat over documents using Streamlit.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama replies in chat; supports slash commands and custom system prompts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama: fluent API, streaming, embeddings, and custom options.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama: chat, completions, and embeddings with strongly-typed models.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile collection: quantized Llama, CodeLlama, Mistral, and fine-tunes ready to pull.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Simple Flask/React GUI to chat with Ollama models from the browser; no auth, single binary.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with optional thread streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin: run Ollama models inside notes for summarization, translation, and idea generation.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Unofficial Nim client for Ollama: lightweight wrapper around the HTTP API with async support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s chat, generate, and embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama: GenServer-based client with streaming and telemetry events.
